## Summary

Explain what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passed, or the environment blocker is explained below.
- [ ] Focused tests were added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] `pnpm run package` and `pnpm run verify-package` passed for package-related changes, or the blocker is explained below.
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private session data, or generated artifacts are included.

## Notes for reviewers

Add any test blocker, rollout consideration, or follow-up work here.
